_instructions: Copia il contenuto di 'photos' in lib/destinations.ts nella Trip corrispondente

photos.alt: Tiered Buddha statues at Seema Malaka, Gangaramaya Temple, Colombo, Sri Lanka, under a clear blue sky, with modern white stupa.
photos.caption: Gangaramaya Temple — tiered serenity, sacred ascent
photos.description: A symphony of bronze Buddha statues ascends tiered platforms at Colombo's Gangaramaya Temple. Golden light illuminates the upper figures and a striking modern white stupa against a pristine blue sky. Deep shadows envelop the foreground, creating a dramatic contrast. This sacred space offers a profound sense of peace amidst the bustling Sri Lankan capital, inviting contemplation of ancient traditions and contemporary architecture.

photos.alt: Serene bronze and golden Buddha statues in meditation poses, rowed along a golden draped altar inside Gangaramaya Temple, Colombo, Sri Lanka.
photos.caption: Colombo — sacred golden rows of ancient wisdom
photos.description: Sunlight illuminates rows of meditating Buddha statues within a revered Colombo temple. Bronze and gold figures, each exuding calm, rest upon vibrant golden draped altars. Behind them, intricate copper relief panels depict ancient Buddhist tales, adding depth to the sacred space. The air hums with spiritual serenity, inviting contemplation amidst the rich cultural heritage of Sri Lanka's capital.

photos.alt: Close-up of a fierce Sri Lankan Dvarapala statue with muscular body, red eyes, and green robes in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
photos.caption: Colombo — ancient guardian's powerful gaze
photos.description: A formidable Sri Lankan guardian deity statue commands attention with its intense, scowling face and bulging muscles. Adorned in vibrant green drapes with gold accents, the figure's powerful pose and vivid red eyes convey ancient protection. Soft indoor light illuminates intricate details, highlighting the craftsmanship of this cultural treasure. It stands as a timeless sentinel, embodying the rich spiritual heritage of Colombo.

photos.alt: Golden Buddha statue in vibrant Gangaramaya Temple shrine, Colombo, Sri Lanka, surrounded by colorful murals & deities.
photos.caption: Gangaramaya Temple — golden serenity, vibrant devotion
photos.description: A resplendent golden Buddha statue sits in serene meditation within a vibrant Sri Lankan temple. Rich orange robes adorn the central figure, framed by an ornate, radiating halo and intricate murals depicting various deities and scenes. Warm, soft artificial light bathes the colorful sanctuary, highlighting detailed sculptures and traditional lamps. The atmosphere evokes deep spiritual devotion and cultural richness in this iconic Colombo landmark.

photos.alt: Vibrant Gangaramaya Temple interior, Colombo, Sri Lanka, with golden Buddha statues, elaborate murals, painted ceiling, and ornate details.
photos.caption: Gangaramaya Temple — golden statues, sacred artistry
photos.description: Within Colombo's Gangaramaya Temple, golden Buddha statues radiate profound serenity. Intricate murals and a richly painted ceiling showcase vibrant Sri Lankan Buddhist artistry. Soft, ambient light illuminates the elaborate details, highlighting centuries of devotion. The atmosphere is steeped in spiritual tranquility, inviting contemplation amidst the sacred geometry and captivating hues.

photos.alt: Close-up of golden Buddha statue, serene face, orange robe, ornate halo, traditional Sri Lankan temple art, Colombo, Sri Lanka
photos.caption: Colombo — golden stillness, ancient wisdom's gaze
photos.description: A striking golden Buddha statue emanates serene wisdom within a Sri Lankan temple. Its downcast eyes and soft, full lips convey profound peace, framed by a detailed urna mark. Cracks in the vibrant yellow-gold paint hint at its age and reverence. The statue's draped orange robe contrasts beautifully with the intricate, multi-layered halo of traditional artwork behind, creating a rich tapestry of spiritual artistry in Colombo's vibrant heart.

photos.alt: Vibrant, intricately painted Sri Lankan temple statues of deities, adorned with flowers & gold, within Gangarama Temple, Colombo.
photos.caption: Gangarama Temple — vibrant deities, sacred offerings
photos.description: Close-up reveals vibrantly painted statues within a Colombo temple, likely Gangarama. Golden-skinned deities, adorned with elaborate headdresses and intricate jewelry, captivate. One figure gently offers a floral garland, reflecting devotional practices. Rich emerald greens, sky blues, and warm reds contrast with the radiant yellow, highlighting the intricate sculptural details. The soft, ambient light enhances the glossy textures and serene expressions, inviting contemplation of Sri Lankan cultural heritage and spiritual artistry.

photos.alt: Vibrant Buddhist statues & murals inside Gangaramaya Temple, Colombo, Sri Lanka. Golden Buddha, colorful deities, intricate art.
photos.caption: Gangaramaya Temple — a tapestry of sacred devotion
photos.description: This vibrant image captures a close-up of intricate Buddhist statues and murals within the revered Gangaramaya Temple in Colombo, Sri Lanka. Golden Buddha figures with serene expressions and richly adorned deities display a tapestry of color. Warm natural light from an unseen window softly highlights the detailed artistry. Vivid reds, blues, and yellows blend with delicate floral patterns, creating an atmosphere of deep spiritual devotion and artistic grandeur unique to Sri Lankan temple traditions. The scene resonates with ancient tales.

photos.alt: Close-up of a large golden Buddha head statue in Colombo, Sri Lanka, reflecting warm interior light and surrounding artifacts.
photos.caption: Colombo — golden serenity reflects sacred light
photos.description: A magnificent golden Buddha head dominates the frame, its polished surface gleaming with warm, ambient light. Reflections dance across its serene features, hinting at intricate temple interiors or antique shop displays in Colombo, Sri Lanka. The metallic sheen beautifully captures the vibrant spiritual essence of Buddhist art. Subtle imperfections add character, enhancing the statue’s timeless grace and evocative presence, inviting contemplation of ancient traditions.

photos.alt: Detailed wooden emaciated ascetic Buddha statue meditating. Ribs, veins visible. Buddhist art in Colombo, Sri Lanka temple.
photos.caption: Colombo — ascetic's profound tranquility
photos.description: The powerful wooden sculpture of the ascetic Buddha sits in deep meditation, revealing his emaciated form, with visible ribs and veins. Exquisite craftsmanship captures profound dedication to enlightenment. Subtle light illuminates the intricate carving, evoking a spiritual ambiance within a temple in Colombo, Sri Lanka. This striking artwork reflects centuries of profound Buddhist devotion.

photos.alt: Bronze Buddha statues in meditation pose beside a preserved ceremonial elephant at Gangaramaya Temple, Colombo, Sri Lanka, rich wooden interior.
photos.caption: Gangaramaya Temple — quiet reverence, sacred echoes
photos.description: Golden light softly illuminates rows of meditating bronze Buddha statues, juxtaposed with the powerful presence of a preserved ceremonial elephant. Rich, dark wooden stairs frame this sacred scene, enhancing the tranquil atmosphere. The vibrant cultural heritage of Sri Lanka resonates within this hallowed space. An aura of quiet reverence invites contemplation, highlighting the timeless spiritual essence of Colombo's most iconic temple.

photos.alt: Seema Malaka Temple, Colombo: Numerous seated Buddha statues in rows, leading to a modern, silvery stupa against a clear blue sky, Sri Lanka.
photos.caption: Seema Malaka — sacred silence, modern spire
photos.description: Golden light illuminates rows of serene Buddha statues at Seema Malaka Temple in Colombo, Sri Lanka. Their meditative forms stand before a striking modern stupa, its metallic surfaces reflecting the brilliant blue sky. This unique architectural fusion creates a profound sense of tranquility and spiritual contemplation, an urban oasis in the bustling capital city.

photos.alt: Rows of dark seated Buddha statues leading to a shimmering modern silver stupa under blue sky at Seema Malaka Temple, Colombo, Sri Lanka.
photos.caption: Seema Malaka — still reflections under a modern grace
photos.description: Beneath a brilliant blue Sri Lankan sky, rows of contemplative Buddha statues gather at the Seema Malaka Temple in Colombo. The serene bronze figures, subtly shadowed, lead the eye towards a striking, multi-tiered stupa. Its reflective, modern facade shimmers with geometric precision, echoing the tranquil presence of the ancient wisdom it houses. A golden Buddha face in the foreground adds a vibrant, spiritual glow to this iconic floating temple.

photos.alt: Colombo's Galle Face Green with modern skyscrapers, vendors, and colorful kites flying against a clear blue sky in Sri Lanka.
photos.caption: Galle Face Green — Colombo's vibrant urban coastal spirit
photos.description: A vibrant scene unfolds at Colombo's Galle Face Green. Majestic modern skyscrapers pierce a pristine blue sky, their glass facades reflecting the bright sun. Below, the expansive green-brown field hums with activity. Local vendors display colorful wares, while kites with long, striped tails dance playfully in the coastal breeze. This dynamic space captures the unique juxtaposition of urban development and relaxed community life along Sri Lanka's bustling capital coastline.

photos.alt: Mahout with a majestic Sri Lankan elephant in Maharagama, bathed in golden light. Lush tropical setting, traditional animal care.
photos.caption: Maharagama — gentle giant's golden hour
photos.description: A towering Sri Lankan elephant stands calmly in Maharagama, its textured hide illuminated by warm, golden light. A mahout, with his back to the viewer, observes the majestic creature amidst lush tropical foliage. The soft morning glow creates deep shadows and highlights, emphasizing the profound connection between man and beast in this tranquil, everyday scene. Nearby structures hint at the proximity of local life.
